title: Social Media Post for a New Product Launch
scenario: Write a social media post for the launch of a new smart home device. The post should be 150-200 words, include a CTA, and be engaging and informative.
constraints: Must include a brief overview of the device's features and benefits.
Must include a CTA to encourage engagement.
Must be written in a conversational tone.

evaluationCriteria.description: Are the device's features and benefits accurate?
Is the tone conversational and engaging?
Is the CTA clear and effective?
